meaning: adj.霍晉ｦｻ逶ｸ遲臥噪,遲芽ｷ晉噪
examples: Altus is equidistant from Ozark and Cotton Town.
All points on a circle are equidistant from the centre.
From where I sit, all the universe is equidistant from my cigarette.
Situated roughly equidistant from Hawaii, Japan and Australia, the atoll encircles the world's largest lagoon.
Oak Ridge is located almost equidistant between Winston-Salem and Greensboro, with each city approximately 20 miles away.
